title: Notes
banner: Ready to turn a note into action?

helpSteps: Each time you create a Note, a star will appear inside the machine.
First, shake your phone to shuffle the stars.
Then press and hold the red button, and rotate it in circles like opening a bottle cap 2-3 times.
When you hear a “click” sound, the small door will open.
Finally, tilt your phone to the right, and the machine will randomly drop one Note as your next task.

timeEstimate.errorMessage: Could not estimate time, please try again later.

emptyNoteMessage.encouragingDescription: We'll hold onto things when life gets busy.
emptyNoteMessage.gashaponTitle: Not enough sparks yet. Gacha opens when there's more
